title: RBI issues final Amendment Directions on Cooling-off Period for Directors of Co-operative Banks
description: The Reserve Bank had, on January 8, 2026, issued Draft Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Governance) Amendment Directions, 2026 and Draft Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Governance) Amendment Directions, 2026, seeking feedback from stakeholders. The draft Amendment Directions proposed to introduce a cooling-off period for directors of UCBs and RCBs after they complete a continuous tenure of ten years on the Board of a UCB / RCB, to ensure that the statutory prov
